headerDisplay: Blasts pre-recorded IR/RF hex signals via a Broadlink RM. Signals must be captured elsewhere (this plugin does not learn or discover devices).

defaultIp.title: Default RM IP Address
defaultIp.description: Used by any accessory below that doesn't specify its own IP address.

showTemperatureHumidity.title: Show temperature and humidity if available
showTemperatureHumidity.description: Not all RM units report real sensor data. If yours doesn't, this sensor will just show "No Response" in Home.

temperatureSensorIp.title: Temperature/Humidity Sensor IP Address
temperatureSensorIp.description: Overrides the default IP address above. Leave empty to use the default.

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: Overrides the default IP address above. Leave empty to use the default.

powerOnCode.title: Power On Signal
powerOnCode.description: Hex code sent to turn the accessory on.

powerOffCode.title: Power Off Signal
powerOffCode.description: Hex code sent to turn the accessory off. Leave empty to reuse the Power On signal (useful for toggle-only remotes).

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: Overrides the default IP address above. Leave empty to use the default.

powerOnCode.title: Power On Signal
powerOnCode.description: Hex code sent to turn the light on. Leave empty to just send the resolved brightness level's signal instead.

powerOffCode.title: Power Off Signal
powerOffCode.description: Hex code sent to turn the light off. Leave empty to reuse the Brightness 0% signal.

useLastKnownBrightness.title: Use Last Known Brightness
useLastKnownBrightness.description: When turning on, restore the last brightness this light was set to instead of a default/max/highest level.

useDefaultBrightnessLevel.title: Set Default Brightness Level
useDefaultBrightnessLevel.description: Used when turning on if last-known brightness doesn't apply.

useMaxBrightnessLevel.title: Set Max Brightness Level
useMaxBrightnessLevel.description: Caps and remaps the 0-100% slider onto this percentage.

zeroPercentCode.title: Brightness 0% Signal
zeroPercentCode.description: Hex code for the lowest (0%) brightness level.

hundredPercentCode.title: Brightness 100% Signal
hundredPercentCode.description: Hex code for true 100% brightness. Always the actual full-brightness signal, regardless of any max brightness cap set above.

debounceSeconds.title: Debounce (seconds)
debounceSeconds.description: Wait this long after the slider stops moving before sending a signal, so dragging doesn't blast every intermediate position.

useBrightnessUpDownSwitches.title: Add Brightness Up/Down Switches
useBrightnessUpDownSwitches.description: Exposes two extra switches that step through the brightness levels below, as an alternative to the slider.

brightnessSwitchesName.title: Up/Down Switches Name
brightnessSwitchesName.description: Leave empty to use this dimmer's own name.

hideBrightnessSlider.title: Don't Show Slider
hideBrightnessSlider.description: Hide this dimmer's brightness slider so only the up/down switches control the level.
